title: biebersteiniaceae
intro: The Biebersteiniaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of plants that are closely related and share similar characteristics. Biebersteiniaceae is a small family of plants that include about 11 species, primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. These plants are typically shrubs or small trees, and are known for their distinctive features such as unique leaf shapes and flower arrangements. The Biebersteiniaceae family is part of the larger group of plants known as the Apiales order, but is distinct due to its unique characteristics and limited distribution.
